title: NuiDock
subtitle: A unified, lazily-created toolbar that collects minimized Modal Dialogs and Sidebar Panels into a single row of chips at the bottom (or top) of the viewport. The dock is created automatically by NuiDockService when the first item is minimized, and destroyed when the last item is restored.

service.title: NuiDockService
service.description: Singleton service (providedIn: 'root') that manages the collection of minimized items and controls the lifecycle of NuiDockComponent. ModalDialog and SidebarPanel use this service internally; you only need to interact with it directly for custom integrations.

rows.add: Registers a new item in the dock. Creates the dock component lazily on the first call.
rows.remove: Removes an item from the dock by its id without invoking its restore callback.
rows.restore: Invokes the item's restore callback and then removes it from the dock.
rows.clearAll: Removes all items from the dock and destroys the dock component.
rows.items: Read-only signal exposing the current array of dock items.

dock-item.title: NuiDockItem
dock-item.description: Runtime model that represents a minimized element in the dock. Instances are created internally by ModalDialogComponent and SidebarPanelComponent when minimize() is called. Fields marked as required must always be provided.

rows.id: Unique identifier for the dock item; matches the id of the originating modal or panel. Required.
rows.type: Origin type of the item: 'modal' for a Modal Dialog, 'sidebar' for a Sidebar Panel. Required.
rows.title: Text label displayed on the dock chip. Required.
rows.prefixIcon: Remix Icon class for the prefix icon inside the chip.
rows.suffixIcon: Remix Icon class for the suffix icon inside the chip. Only displayed when prefixIcon is also set.
rows.hideSuffixIcon: When true, hides the directional arrow icon automatically added to sidebar chips based on their original position.
rows.color: NUI semantic color applied as an accent border on the chip.
rows.position: Original position of the sidebar panel ('right', 'left', 'top', 'bottom'). Only present when type === 'sidebar'; used to render a directional arrow icon.
rows.cssClass: Additional CSS classes applied to the chip button element.
rows.restore: Callback invoked when the chip is clicked to restore the originating component. Required.

dock-tab-config.title: DockTabConfig
dock-tab-config.description: Optional visual customization object accepted by ModalDialogConfig and SidebarPanelConfig via the dockTabConfig property. All fields are optional; omitted fields fall back to component defaults.
dock-tab-config.note: Pass a DockTabConfig when opening a modal or sidebar panel to control how its minimized chip appears in the dock.

rows.prefixIcon: Remix Icon class displayed as the prefix icon inside the chip. In a SidebarPanel, a directional icon is shown by default when this is omitted.
rows.suffixIcon: Remix Icon class displayed as the suffix icon inside the chip. Only rendered when prefixIcon is also provided.
rows.hideSuffixIcon: When true, suppresses the automatic directional arrow icon added to sidebar chips based on the panel's original position.
rows.label: Alternative text label for the chip. When omitted, the component's own title is used.
rows.cssClass: One or more additional CSS classes applied to the chip button element.

colors.title: Color tokens
colors.description: Override these CSS custom properties to adapt the dock chip appearance to your brand or custom theme.

rows.separatorColor: Color of the vertical separator between modal and sidebar chip groups

layout.title: Layout tokens
layout.description: Override these CSS custom properties to control the dock position, size, and chip geometry.

rows.zIndex: Stack layer for the dock toolbar, ensuring it appears above other fixed elements
rows.offset: Distance between the dock and the viewport edge (bottom or top depending on position)
rows.maxWidth: Maximum width of the dock container; set a value to prevent it from spanning the full viewport width
rows.borderRadius: Corner radius of each chip button

tokens.title: i18n tokens
tokens.description: The dock uses two dock-specific tokens (dock.ariaLabel, dock.sheetTitle) and two shared top-level tokens (restore, close). All can be overridden globally via provideNuiI18n().
tokens.note: All NUI i18n strings can be overridden globally via provideNuiI18n(). The dock does not support per-instance i18n overrides as it is managed automatically by the service.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible label for the dock toolbar (role="toolbar" element)

sheetTitle.description: Title displayed in the bottom sheet header and used as the accessible label of the overflow sheet dialog

restore.description: Accessible label prefix for the restore button on each chip — concatenated with the item title (shared top-level key)

close.description: Accessible label prefix for the dismiss button on each chip — concatenated with the item title (shared top-level key)

options.title: Global config options
options.description: These options can be set globally via provideNUI({ config: { dock: { ... } } }) and apply to all dock instances in the application.

rows.position: Viewport edge where the dock is rendered
rows.showTypeSeparator: Show a vertical separator between modal chips and sidebar chips
rows.maxVisibleChips: Maximum number of chips shown in the toolbar before the rest collapse into a '+N' overflow chip. Recommended for mobile. When undefined, all chips are visible.

example.title: Configuration example
example.description: Pass a NuiDockGlobalConfig object inside provideNUI to set application-wide defaults.
